overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking from an indoor workshop through the neon-lit streets of Night City at dusk, passing through covered industrial alleys and underpasses, and observing a brief combat encounter between NPCs before returning to the main thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial workshop or garage with workbenches and vending machine

agents.ego_description: walking through the interior of a workshop toward the exit, passing by tools and equipment

entered.detail: tall purple vending machine with glowing interface on the left side of the room
cluttered workbench with tools and objects in the center area
tall metal shelving units with blue and red storage containers
wall-mounted tool cabinets and equipment racks
industrial ceiling lights illuminating the workshop

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a dimly lit industrial workshop or garage. A distinctive purple vending machine stands on the left, while metal workbenches and shelving units fill the center and right. The player walks steadily forward toward a bright exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban city street with digital billboards and commercial buildings

events.description: exits the indoor workshop through a large garage door into the open city street
transition from artificial indoor lighting to natural dusk light mixed with neon city lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk, moving past commercial buildings and digital advertisements

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent CALIENTE signage and digital displays
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades displaying various advertisements
tall palm trees lining the street in the background
painted yellow safety line running along the edge of the sidewalk
modern street lamp posts along the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the garage into the bustling streets of Night City at dusk. The CALIENTE building dominates the view ahead with massive digital billboards illuminating the scene. The camera moves along a concrete sidewalk marked with yellow safety lines, passing between tall commercial buildings and palm trees as neon lights begin to glow in the fading natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian alleyway under an overpass with industrial infrastructure

events.description: enters a covered alleyway beneath an overpass with industrial pillars and neon lighting
two NPCs engaged in a fist fight in the alleyway ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow covered alley, passing by NPCs standing near outdoor seating areas, and observing a fight between two individuals

notable_agents.action: two individuals engaged in hand-to-hand combat, throwing punches at each other

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass creating a roof over the alleyway
large cylindrical concrete support pillars lining the left side of the walkway
glowing green neon sign indicating an open business establishment
red and white plastic chairs and tables arranged outside a storefront
rectangular ventilation grates and air conditioning units mounted on the wall
exposed industrial piping and conduit running along the right wall
yellow industrial waste container visible at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow, covered alleyway beneath a massive concrete overpass. The space is dimly lit by neon signs, including a green 'OPEN' sign, with industrial pillars and exposed pipes lining the walls. Several NPCs stand around outdoor plastic seating areas. Around the 37-second mark, two individuals are seen fighting in the center of the alley ahead as the player continues walking toward a yellow dumpster at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban thoroughfare with modern commercial buildings and digital advertising

events.description: exits the covered alley back onto the open city street with wider visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing along the city sidewalk back in the open air, moving past modern glass buildings and digital billboards

entered.detail: broad paved street with multiple lanes visible ahead
tall modern skyscrapers with reflective glass facades rising in the distance
contemporary commercial buildings with clean architectural lines

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow alley back onto a wide, open city street. The environment shifts from enclosed industrial space to an airy urban thoroughfare lined with modern glass skyscrapers and large digital billboards. The camera continues walking along the yellow-marked sidewalk, passing contemporary commercial buildings as the natural dusk light mixes with the glow of city advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a dim industrial interior into the neon-saturated urban sprawl of Night City at dusk. It begins inside a dimly lit garage filled with metal workbenches and a purple vending machine, moving steadily toward a bright distant exit. As the camera emerges from the workshop, the scene opens into a bustling street dominated by the massive digital billboards of the CALIENTE building and palm trees lining a yellow-marked sidewalk. The view then shifts into a narrow, covered alleyway beneath a concrete overpass, where the light dims and the camera passes neon signs and NPCs, including two individuals fighting near a yellow dumpster. Finally, the camera exits the enclosed industrial space and returns to a wide, airy thoroughfare lined with glass skyscrapers and glowing advertisements under the fading natural light.
